# SOURCE — IDEA POWER (IPWR)

> **Pessoa:** David Deutsch
> **Tipo:** COURSE (Online)
> **Arquivos:** 56
> **Bytes:** 525,594
> **Elementos extraídos:** 114
> **Ano:** ~2023
> **Processado:** 2026-03-17

---

## VISÃO GERAL

Idea Power é o curso de David Deutsch sobre geração sistemática de ideias. Baseado em TRIZ/SIT (Systematic Inventive Thinking), adaptado para marketing, negócios e vida pessoal. Ensinado inteiramente via narrativa ficcional — a história de um dono de livraria falindo que aprende 15 "Boxes" de criatividade de seu vizinho inventor, Tom.

## ESTRUTURA

| Módulo | Conteúdo | Arquivos |
|--------|----------|----------|
| 01-Introduction | Por que ideias importam + estrutura do curso | 3 |
| 02-Adventures (Video) | 9 adventures com história contínua + 15 Boxes | 10 |
| 02-Adventures/Resources | PDFs dos Boxes (worksheets) + adventure summaries | 21 |
| 03-Bonuses | 6 bônus: Ideas to Dollars, Parris, AI, Persuasion, Implementation, Million Dollar Idea | 15 |
| 04-Appendix | Pocket Idea Generator + Feedback | 2 |

## OS 15 BOXES

| # | Box | Grupo | Descrição Core |
|---|-----|-------|----------------|
| 1 | Add a New Dimension | Foundation | Senses, movement, time, order |
| 2 | Do the Opposite | Vegematic | Reverse, flip, invert |
| 3 | Divide It Up | Vegematic | Section, segment, subdivide |
| 4 | Take Something Out | Vegematic | Remove, extract, highlight |
| 5 | Bring Some Things Together | Vegematic | Combine, merge, partner |
| 6 | Put One Thing Inside Another | Nesting | Embed, nest, matryoshka |
| 7 | Do It Beforehand | Nesting | Pre-empt, prevent, anticipate |
| 8 | Convert into a Benefit | Nesting | Negative → Positive, reframe |
| 9 | Switch Gears | Action | Speed, quantity (more/less) |
| 10 | Revise the Rhythm | Action | Continuous ↔ Intermittent |
| 11 | Do It Itself (D.I.I.) | Action | Self-service, automate |
| 12 | Change the Intensity | Interaction | Force, emotion, attention |
| 13 | Add to the Interaction | Interaction | Intermediary, endorsement |
| 14 | Change the Shape | Right Stuff | Reconfigure, restructure |
| 15 | Change the Look | Right Stuff | Visual transformation |

## DOMÍNIOS

- creativity
- idea-generation
- systematic-thinking
- problem-solving
- innovation

### Secundários (IPWR)
- business-ideation
- monetization
- persuasion (via creativity)
- copywriting-creativity (bridge ACLS ↔ IPWR)
- cross-pollination
- execution
- learning/pedagogy

## KEY INSIGHTS

1. **Think Inside the Box** — 15 constrained search spaces > unlimited "outside the box" thinking
2. **Problem Reframing** — 80% of solving is defining correctly (acid tank → "how can tank tell us?")
3. **Creativity Is Systematic** — Not mystical talent. Anyone can learn with a system.
4. **Ideas Are What Sell** — Not writing, layout, or offer. Ideas drive results.
5. **No Pessimism** — The word "impossible" is forbidden. Only what is possible.
6. **Application > Contemplation** — Apply immediately to secure learning.
7. **Prototype Before Committing** — Try it for a day or two. MVP. Experiment.
8. **15 Boxes Applied to Copy** — Each box can supercharge headlines, bullets, angles.
9. **Ideas-to-Dollars** — 6 paths to monetize any idea.
10. **Million Dollar Title** — Association chain + familiar phrase + twist = "There's a Customer Born Every Minute."

## CONEXÕES COM ACLS

| Conceito IPWR | Expandido de ACLS | Relação |
|---------------|-------------------|---------|
| 15 Boxes System | Simple Math for Ideas (FW-DD-014) | IPWR é a versão completa do que ACLS introduziu como 4 operações |
| Volume > Quality (FIL-DD-006) | 100 Headlines Methodology (MET-DD-001) | Mesmo princípio, agora com sistema de boxes |
| Bad Ideas → Good Ideas (FIL-DD-023) | Never Dismiss Absurd Ideas (FIL-DD-042) | Reforçado e sistematizado |
| Box 2 Do the Opposite | HEUR-DD-015 Opposite Technique | Formalizado como Box com sub-dimensões |
| Problem Reframing | Indirect Copy for Stage 5 (MET-DD-009) | Mesmo princípio de reframing aplicado a marketing vs engenharia |
